feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow may lower to 800m about and east of the summit this evening. Less than 1 cm is expected to accumulate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow is expected to lower to 900m this evening, then 800m overnight. However, a warm road means very little snow is expected to persist on the road until overnight, when up to 2cm may accumulate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
